titleStmt.title: A Transcription of John in 168
GA 168
The New Testament
Das Neue Testament
The Gospel according to John
john

respStmt.name: the International Greek New Testament Project

titleStmt.funder: The Arts and Humanities Research Council

sponsor.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing

publisher.name: The Institute for Textual Scholarship and Electronic Editing
University of Birmingham

availability.p: Licensed under a Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License (CC BY 4.0): available for re-use provided attribution is made to the original creators (the IGNTP and any named participants) and an indication is given of any changes made. See further .

projectDesc.p: This transcription was made by the International Greek New Testament Project in its work towards the Editio Critica Maior of John between 2010 and 2013.

editorialDecl.p: The initial transcription file was a plain text file for use with COLLATE, later converted to XML. The original transcription guidelines can be found at
The plain text file was converted to XML by Catherine Smith using the project's Python conversion scripts 1.0.
The XML specifications used are version 1.4 of the IGNTP Guidelines available at

revisionDesc.change: Repeat of καθως ειπον υμιν moved from 10.26 to 10.27 by David Parker.
Second o added in 18.3 by David Parker.
First 17.19, αυτου changed to αυτων by David Parker.
ηλθεν ουν moved from 19.38 to 19.39 by David Parker.
α εαν changed to εαν at C 7.37 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 19.34 changed by Rachel Kevern.
rest of verse lac tag added at 1.14 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 10.35 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
καταβεβηκαν changed to καταβεβηκα at 6.42 by Rachel Kevern.
Word break at 20.23 corrected by Rachel Kevern.
αυ αυτου changed to αυαυτου at 12.25, and αφιημιν changed to αφιημι ν at 14.27 by Rachel Kevern
Correction corrected at 19.29 by David Parker.
Word breaks in 18.14 and 21.1 corrected by David Parker.
Ghost pages removed by Catherine Smith.
Adjusted to XML specifications 1.4 (apart from handling of ghost pages) by Hugh Houghton.
Converted from plain text by Catherine Smith using Python conversion scripts 1.0.

body.note: Status:G-A Number: 168Name of book transcribed: JohnFirst folio transcribed: 134rBase text used: TRns Transcribed by: E. PanouTranscription begun: 6 DecTranscription finished: 10 Dec Does this manuscript contain (delete and complete as appropriate): Lectionary annotations - Yes Initials and other enlarged letters - Yes Diples (> or >> in the margin next to certain text, indicating that text is a quotation from the Old Testament) - No Are there any special symbols in the margin next to any of the following verses: 5.4 No 7.53 - 8.11 No. This section has been omitted. Other remarks: Ms extra sheets transcribed as 155a (r/v) and 155b (r/v) in the order 155r, 155av, 156ar, 155bv, 156br, 156v.202a (r/v) and 202b (r/v) in the order 202r, 202av, 203ar, 202bv, 203br, 203v.Ms has several repeated verses as follows:4.51 repeated on F151r. 5.22-23 repeated on F153v. 5.30 repeated on F154v. 10.10 repeated on F175v.10.26 end of verse repeated on f177v.13.34 repeated on F207r. Ms has a number of omissions, lacunae and out of order folios, as follows:1.1-13 lac 5.12 om 6.28-40 lac 7.53-8.11 om12.41-46 om18.40-19.1-27 omF 187v (up to 12.40) cοntinues οn F 202bv (12.46ff) (203ar contains no biblical text)F 209v (up to 14.17) cοntinues οn F 188r (14.18ff)F 202r (up to 18.39) (202av contains no biblical text) cοntinues οn F 210r (19.28ff). Often shortens verses by deleting the second half of a verse. Heavily abbreviated. FINAL plain text transcription date: 24.04.2103

ab.note: The text of 6.28-40 is possibly on the following leaf which is cut out.
Half of this leaf is missing, cut vertically.
